title: athyrium deltoidofrons var. gracillimum
intro: Athyrium deltoidofrons var. gracillimum, also known as Japanese lady fern, is a variety of the Athyrium deltoidofrons plant, which is a type of flowering plant in the wood fern family. The Japanese lady fern has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of consuming the Japanese lady fern include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support immune function. In terms of herbal preparations, the leaves of the Japanese lady fern can be used to make tea, tinctures, or infusions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
